Modernize Your Data Pipelines for AI

Join us live today, April 21, to see how to modernize your stack before it falls behind. You'll learn:

  • CDC in Practice: When it’s the right move (and when it’s not).

  • Navigating Hybrid: How to handle complex environments without manual friction.

  • Modern Destinations: Delivering high-speed data into Delta Lake and Iceberg via CData Sync.
Join Us Live

About this Newsletter

TDS Daily

Each day, we bring you a fresh mix of trending topics, practical tutorials, and thought-provoking reads from across the data-science landscape. Whether you're exploring machine learning, AI, or data engineering, you'll find something to spark new ideas and keep you ahead of the curve.
